title: ranunculus auricomus subsp. pseudopsis
intro: Ranunculus auricomus subsp. pseudopsis, also known as the goldilocks buttercup, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Ranunculus and the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus auricomus subsp. pseudopsis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from pain, fever, and other ailments.
